titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 5: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 5. (A.R. No. 144 of 1928.) TIRUPPAḺANAM, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Āpatsahāyēśvara temple.

Incomplete. Damaged in several places. It records that an individual Kaṟṟaḷi Bhaṭṭālagaṉ, a member of the (regiment) Arumoḻidēva-teriñja kaikōḷar purchased several plots of dry-crop land at Pēraṅgālakkuḍi, a dēvadānam in Miṟai-kkūṟṟam from the Ādichaṇḍēśvarar (the god-secretary of the temple) and padipādamūlattār (the worshipping priest of the sanctum) and endowed the same after reclaiming them, for feeding four brāhmaṇas daily, in the temple at Tiruppaḻanam, a dēvadānam in Miṟai-kkūṟṟam.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 29.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu miṟaik kūṟṟattu devatāṉam tiruppaḻaṉamuṭaiyār koyilile nicati nālvar brāhmaṇar
candrātitaval Uṇṇa Ivvūr tevatāṉam peraṅkālakkuṭi Eliyūtu puṉcey tiṭal Ivāticaṇḍeśvarariṭaiyum patipātamulattāriṭaiyum U
ṭaiyār Arumoḻiteva teriñcakaikoḷaril kaṟṟaḷi paṭṭālakaṉ vilai koṇṭu mayakkiṉa nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai peṟṟāṉmayakkalukkum naṅ
kāriy mayakkalukku meṟkku teṉpārkkellai naṅkāri mayakkalukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai mātevimayakkalukku pāyñca Uḷciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻa
kku kiḻpārkke ttiṭalakkā kālukku meṟkkum teṉpā ya ciṟuvāykkālu
kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkke kkum vaṭapārkkellai cātti mayakkalu Ivvicaitta pe
runāṉkellai ṉum Ivaṉukke viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpārkkel
lai mūṉ lai Oru māvaraikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai ciṟu vāykkā
lukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nā
ṟṟukālukku teṟkkum Ivvicaitta
perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nila
mum Ituvallatu Iṉṉum Ivaṉukke viṟṟuk kuṭut
ta nilam kiḻppārkkellai kiḻāṉ kāṇikka
ykkum meṟkum teṉpārkkellai paḻaṅ ceyk
ku vaṭakku melpārkkellai toṭi muṉṟumāvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Oru māvaraikkum tiṭa
lukkum tiruvaṭi mayakkalukkum teṟkkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nila
mum Itu vallatu Iṉṉum Ivaṉukkey maṇṇilaiyāka
viṟṟuk kuṭutta puṉcey tiṭal Iraṇṭumāvum I
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
